title: Accessible Tooltip

statement.markdown:
# Accessible Tooltip

### Requirements
1. Create a tooltip that can be triggered by hovering over an element with the class `tooltip-trigger`.
2. The tooltip should appear at the bottom of the hovered element.
3. The tooltip should have a maximum width of 200px and a minimum width of 100px.
4. The tooltip should have a padding of 10px and a font size of 14px.
5. The tooltip should be accessible for screen readers and should be announced when the user hovers over the element with the class `tooltip-trigger`.
6. The tooltip should be hidden when the user moves out of the element with the class `tooltip-trigger` or when the user clicks outside the tooltip.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling
Use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for implementation
Make sure the tooltip is accessible for screen readers
